description:
Operating Area: South Pacific Ocean, Fiji, French Polynesia, Papua New Guinea, Solomon Island, Vanuatu, New Caledonia, Australia, Palau, Marshall Islands, Cook Islands, Galapagos Islands

MISCHIEF is a 54m / 177ft Motor Superyacht built in 2006 by Baglietto and refit in 2024. Sleeping 12 guests in 6 cabins and with a crew of 14. Cruising at 12.50 kn/ph with a top speed of 17.00 kn/ph. The guest cabins comprise a master suite with a super king size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities located on the main deck, 2 VIP cabins with a super king size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, a cabin with a king size bed and en-suite bathroom and 2 cabins with a queen size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities.

crew.name: Christopher (Chris)
crew.bio:
Position: Captain (October & November)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Perth

Professional Background:

Captain Chris started his career on High Speed Ferries. In his 8 years he worked his way from Jetty Hand to Fleet Captain. From there he moved into professional Yachting and obtained his Master (Y) Unlimited, thus far has enjoyed an illustrious 20+ years!

Favourite Charter Destination: Norway, Kimberleys, Ibiza, Corsica, Sardinia and Aeolian Island. To name a few!

Favourite Yachting Experience: That would have to be cruising the West Coast of Australia via Abrolhos Island to Broome and through the Kimberleys.

crew.name: Byron
crew.bio:
Position: Chief Officer
(Rotation 2:2 September to October)
Nationality: New Zealand
Born Where you grew up: Hawkes Bay

Professional Background:

Byron joins us from New Zealand and has been working in the yachting industry for over 14 years. Yachting has brought him all over the world, cruising as far North as Alaska and as far South as Patagonia and all through the Pacific. Having a busy last few years working on completing his Master 3000.

In his spare time, Byron likes to explore new destinations in search of the best spots for surfing and kite surfing or jumping off a mountain with his paraglider whilst experiencing new cultures along the way.

Favourite Charter Destination: Byron's favourite charter destination is the Pacific Islands, but to say one country would have to be Papua New Guinea, he was lucky enough to work on a vessel that liked to volunteer Crew expertise back in the community were needed. The best of both worlds some would say.

crew.name: Jay (JDV)
crew.bio:
Position: Chief Officer
(Rotation 2:2 November to December)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Sydney

Professional Background:

I have been working in superyachting since 2008 and have been employed on commercial charter yachts from 50-90m. Cruising all of the America's, most of Northern, Eastern and western Mediterranean, and have travelled to over 50 countries. Tried my best to fish them all too.

Favourite Charter Destination: Turkey, from Istanbul right down to Bodrum

Favourite Yachting Experience: Diving and fishing guest charter with a support vessel in the southern Caribbean islands, A,B,C islands and surrounds.

crew.name: Mitchell (Hollywood)
crew.bio:
Position: Bosun
(Rotation 2:2 September to October)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Melbourne

Professional Background:

I started driving for my father's water taxi business, driving classic wooden boats on the Yarra river in Melbourne. I then moved into yachting and have worked on a number of vessels all over the world from 35m to 70m in length.

Favourite Charter Destination: Bahamas

Favourite Yachting Experience: Sailing through Canada and seeing whales and icebergs.

crew.name: Ari (Ariana Grande)
crew.bio:
Position: Deckhand
(Rotation 2:1 May-June, August-September, October-December)
Nationality: New Zealander
Where you grew up: Whangarei, NZ

Professional Background:

In between Surf Coaching, concreting and landscaping Ari enjoyed competing in Surf competitions throughout New Zealand and fishing the far north. His attraction to yachting was a life on the water and the cool places it will take him.

Favourite Charter Destination: Fiji

Favourite Yachting Experience: Ari really enjoyed anchoring at Tavarua Island in Fiji and having the opportunity to surf Cloud Break! Bit of a life goal. He also made the most of exploring local restaurants and cuisines.

crew.name: Cruz (Cruzy)
crew.bio:
Position: Deckhand
(Rotation 2:1 September to November)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Yeppoon, QLD

Professional Background:

Cruz started his career in commercial boating as a deckhand at 23. He spent 6 years around Great Keppel Island on Ferries, Barges, Sail Charters and Dive ops. With his Coxswains in hand he was able to stand in as Relief Skipper. A budding Mischief Captain in the making perhaps?

Favourite Charter Destination: Sicily

Favourite Yachting Experience: Having grown up in a smaller Queensland town Cruz really appreciates the social aspect of yachting and the opportunities to meet and work with people from all over the world, even right here in his own backyard.

crew.name: Liam (Lion)
crew.bio:
Position: Deckhand
(Rotation 2:2 October to December)
Nationality: New Zealand
Where you grew up: Mount Maunganui, NZ

Professional Background:

With three years' experience in yachting. Liam built on a passion that originated from growing up around boats and the water. His previous background in real estate and property development has shaped his professional life, but a love for the ocean and maritime adventure has always been at the core. Lion is drawn to the destinations where there is good surf and the beer is cold.

Favourite Charter Destination: The South Pacific is a memorable destination for Liam. The combination of stunning islands, clear blue seas, and the sheer vastness of the region created an unforgettable adventure. The beauty of the South Pacific, along with its sense of remoteness, made it an experience like no other.

Favourite Yachting Experience: His favourite yachting experience was taking charter guests diving and spearfishing in the untouched waters of Papua New Guinea, exploring vibrant reefs and remote locations.

crew.name: Marin (The Bear)
crew.bio:
Position: Chief Engineer
(Rotation 2:2 October to November)
Nationality: Croatian
Where you grew up:

Professional Background:

Marin is Mischiefs longest standing crew member having worked onboard for 8 years! He is a man of great knowledge and many a story, best heard in real life.

Favourite Charter Destination: Croatia! Shall we go?

Favourite Yachting Experience: A child at heart, Marin enjoys the remote locations and water sport activities. He has a very fond memory of a recent charter, heading off on the Jet ski with one of our young guests to zoom between the Islands, they spotted fish and bright blue starfish and spoke of their homes.

crew.name: Killian (Killa)
crew.bio:
Position: 2nd Engineer
(Rotation 2:2 October to November)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Sydney

Professional Background:

A professional tinkerer and certified Yachtie, Killa will fix it.

Favourite Charter Destination: Sicily, Syracuse

Favourite Yachting Experience: So far Killian hasn't experienced anything that can top Sailing the Greek Islands.

crew.name: Bob (Bobbie)
crew.bio:
Position: Executive Chef
(Rotation 2:2 Goes where the boats need him)
Nationality: British
Where you grew up: Rotterdam, Holland

Professional Background:

Bobbie worked at a 1 Michelin star and a 3 Michelin star restaurant back in the Netherlands and has been working on Mischief since the beginning of 2021. He loves the dynamic and busy environment in super yachting!

Favourite Charter Destination: Whitsundays

Favourite Yachting Experience: Japanese themed nights and beach seafood BBQs

crew.name: Shane (Shano)
crew.bio:
Position: Sous Chef
(Rotation 22 September to October)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Canberra

Professional Background:

Shano started in cafes and restaurants and moved into the music industry, catering film & television, event catering, private catering before finding himself Freelancing for a good 16 years in Australia, England and France. Versatility is his specialty and he believes in good honest food that brings people comfort and joy and if people aren't laughing, it's not working.

Favourite Charter Destination: Whitsundays

Favourite Yachting Experience Working a wedding charter on Mischief with Chef Boris.

crew.name: Garan
crew.bio:
Position: Sous Chef
(Rotation 2:2 October to November)
Nationality: Australian
Where I grew up: Adelaide

Professional Background:

Garan is luxury hotel trained in Ulura, Fairmont Royal York hotel in Toronto, Film catering. Private and corporate high-end catering. He joined Mischief in 2021 and has been adding his phenomenal touch to the Ahoy Club Fleet ever since.

Favourite Charter Destination: Whitehaven Beach

Favourite Yachting Experience: For Garan every destination is a joyful experience, the Whitsundays has been by far been his favourite. Beach BBQ's, snorkelling, themed events and fishing, he's here for it all!

crew.name: Cassie(Cass, Cassilda or Little Chiefy)
crew.bio:
Position: Chief Stewardess
(Rotation 2:2 July to November)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: The Sunny Gold Coast

Professional Background:

Cass began working in Childcare at the age of 16 and nannying 5 children from 17 years. She spent a little time as a personal assistant before finding herself yachting in the Mediterranean throughout Summer. Once Cass landed in South Africa she crossed into Personal Training... since then she has returned to the world of Yachting, enjoying the opportunity to combine the skills acquired over the years.

Favourite Charter Destination: Overseas - Malta. Aus - Whitsundays.

Favourite Yachting Experience: Beach picnics and themed events onboard are hands down the best times on charter yachts. Her favourite on Mischief so far would have to be the Superhero Party we had onboard for one teenaged guest. All 14 crew and 9 guests wore full costumes for the day. The adults definitely got just as much enjoyment out of it as the kids (maybe more). The party finished at sunset with an arm wrestling competition between the crew and guests. The finale between the oldest son and his father. It was a day to remember for sure.

crew.name: Jamie (Jamie)
crew.bio:
Position: 2nd Stewardess
(Rotation 2:2 August to September, December to January)
Nationality: New Zealander
Where you grew up: Mangawhai, NZ

Professional Background:

Jamie has been yachting for 4 years throughout the Med and Australia, enjoying a few smaller yachts before making her way to Mischief. Prior to that she worked in Hospitality management in New Zealand.

Favourite Charter Destination: Croatia

Favourite Yachting Experience: Jamie was lucky enough to do a charter in Western Aus they were shown to a honey hole in Abrolhos Islands, 3 of them caught 28 crayfish in 10 minutes!

crew.name: Amanda (Mands)
crew.bio:
Position: 2nd Stewardess + Spa therapist
(Rotation 2:2 October to November)
Nationality: Australian
Where you grew up: Brisbane

Professional Background:

Mands has been a passionate Beauty Therapist for 20 years and an enthusiastic Yacht Stewardess for 10. What more could you want!

Favourite Charter Destination: Fiji and Tahiti

Favourite Yachting Experience: Her fondest memory is feeding stingrays and black tip reef sharks in Moorea, Tahiti and scuba diving.

crew.name: Izla
crew.bio:
Position: Stewardess
(Rotation 2:1 September to November)
Nationality: New Zealander
Where you grew up: Tauranga, NZ

Professional Background:

Favourite Charter Destination: Izla loved her time in the Whitsundays this year and would love to make her way to Greece one day.

Favourite Yachting Experience: Leaving her home town and travelling to Italy!

crew.name: Rebecca (Becca)
crew.bio:
Position: Stewardess + Masseuse
(Rotation 2:1 October to November)
Nationality: American
Where you grew up: Idaho

Professional Background:

Becca went to massage therapy school in Maui, Hawaii in 2017. She worked at Blue Star Resort for 3 years. When Covid shut down the island and tourism she found her love for Scuba Diving and has been working as an instructor since 2020. In March of 2023 she moved to Australia working the Great Barrier Reef and Ningaloo Reef. After deciding to to combine her massage and diving skills with her years of hospitality she took a leap into yachting.

Favourite Charter Destination: Whitsundays (so far)

Favourite Yachting Experience: Seeing whales while underway has been a major highlight for Becca.
